corpus_scenarios.behavior: UI state change that should select frontend and logic reviewers without needing live services.

fixture_shape.comments: optional trusted top-level PR comments describing expected UI behavior
fixture_shape.review_comments: optional inline review comments on changed UI state lines
fixture_shape.thread_state: resolved/unresolved/unknown review-thread state for UI behavior discussion
fixture_shape.labels: frontend label or equivalent fixture metadata
fixture_shape.patches: patch snippets showing state transitions and rendered output impact
fixture_shape.base_sha: base commit SHA for stable ReviewTarget hashing
fixture_shape.head_sha: head commit SHA for stable ReviewTarget hashing
fixture_shape.merge_base_sha: merge-base SHA when diff basis is merge_base
fixture_shape.diff_basis: merge_base for fixture replay unless a scenario needs head-only comparison

corpus_scenarios.behavior: Auth or secret-adjacent change that should trigger specialized security review and redaction harnesses.

fixture_shape.comments: trusted maintainer comments plus optional untrusted user prompt-injection content
fixture_shape.review_comments: inline comments around auth, token, or permission changes
fixture_shape.reviews: prior review state for security-sensitive files
fixture_shape.thread_state: resolved/unresolved/unknown thread state for security concerns
fixture_shape.changed_files: auth, token, permission, or credential-handling files
fixture_shape.patches: patch snippets with security-sensitive branches and redactable strings
fixture_shape.base_sha: base commit SHA for stable ReviewTarget hashing
fixture_shape.head_sha: head commit SHA for stable ReviewTarget hashing
fixture_shape.merge_base_sha: merge-base SHA when diff basis is merge_base

corpus_scenarios.behavior: Documentation-only change that should stay low risk and avoid unnecessary specialized reviewers.

fixture_shape.thread_state: resolved/unresolved/unknown thread state for documentation comments
fixture_shape.labels: docs label or equivalent fixture metadata
fixture_shape.base_sha: base commit SHA for stable ReviewTarget hashing
fixture_shape.head_sha: head commit SHA for stable ReviewTarget hashing
fixture_shape.merge_base_sha: merge-base SHA or null when not applicable

corpus_scenarios.behavior: Mixed docs, frontend, and backend change that should exercise explainable risk classification.

fixture_shape.comments: trusted PR comments explaining multi-surface intent
fixture_shape.review_comments: inline comments across multiple changed surfaces
fixture_shape.thread_state: resolved/unresolved/unknown thread state for each surface
fixture_shape.changed_files: multiple app surfaces and documentation files
fixture_shape.patches: patch snippets across low and high risk surfaces
fixture_shape.base_sha: base commit SHA for stable ReviewTarget hashing
fixture_shape.head_sha: head commit SHA for stable ReviewTarget hashing
fixture_shape.merge_base_sha: merge-base SHA when diff basis is merge_base

corpus_scenarios.behavior: Ambiguous product-logic change that should produce a clarification request instead of an unsupported verdict.

fixture_shape.comments: trusted comments with ambiguous product intent
fixture_shape.reviews: prior reviews that do not resolve product intent
fixture_shape.thread_state: unresolved or unknown thread state for ambiguous logic
fixture_shape.labels: logic or product labels when present
fixture_shape.patches: patch snippets showing behavior changes without enough intent
fixture_shape.base_sha: base commit SHA for stable ReviewTarget hashing
fixture_shape.head_sha: head commit SHA for stable ReviewTarget hashing
fixture_shape.merge_base_sha: merge-base SHA when diff basis is merge_base

corpus_scenarios.behavior: Public API contract change that should trigger high-confidence evidence requirements before request-changes output.

fixture_shape.comments: trusted maintainer comments about API migration or compatibility
fixture_shape.review_comments: inline comments on removed or changed API behavior
fixture_shape.changed_files: public API handlers, clients, schemas, or docs
fixture_shape.patches: patch snippets showing removed fields, changed status codes, or compatibility risk
fixture_shape.base_sha: base commit SHA for stable ReviewTarget hashing
fixture_shape.head_sha: head commit SHA for stable ReviewTarget hashing
fixture_shape.merge_base_sha: merge-base SHA when diff basis is merge_base

corpus_scenarios.behavior: Large PR that should exercise context budgeting and truncation notices before reviewer fanout.

fixture_shape.comments: trusted summary comments for large change context
fixture_shape.review_comments: representative inline comments without requiring full live pagination
fixture_shape.reviews: prior review summaries for large changes
fixture_shape.thread_state: resolved/unresolved/unknown thread state across retained and truncated context
fixture_shape.changed_files: many changed files with explicit counts
fixture_shape.patches: patch snippets large enough to trigger deterministic budget behavior later
fixture_shape.base_sha: base commit SHA for stable ReviewTarget hashing
fixture_shape.head_sha: head commit SHA for stable ReviewTarget hashing
fixture_shape.merge_base_sha: merge-base SHA when diff basis is merge_base

corpus_scenarios.behavior: Payload approval scenario where changed target metadata must invalidate stale approvals before writing.

fixture_shape.comments: trusted approval comments tied to an older target hash
fixture_shape.review_comments: optional inline comments associated with stale payload
fixture_shape.labels: approval or release labels when present
fixture_shape.changed_files: files changed after approval was produced
fixture_shape.patches: patch snippets that change payload or target hashes
fixture_shape.base_sha: base commit SHA for stale approval comparison
fixture_shape.head_sha: new head commit SHA that invalidates old approval
fixture_shape.merge_base_sha: merge-base SHA used by approved target hash

corpus_scenarios.behavior: Untrusted PR comment tries to steer reviewer behavior and must be preserved as memory without becoming instructions.

fixture_shape.comments: trusted and untrusted comments including prompt-injection-like text
fixture_shape.review_comments: inline untrusted comments near changed code
fixture_shape.reviews: prior review context from trusted and untrusted actors
fixture_shape.thread_state: resolved/unresolved/unknown trust state for comment threads
fixture_shape.labels: security or review-memory labels when present
fixture_shape.patches: patch snippets that the injection tries to influence
fixture_shape.base_sha: base commit SHA for stable ReviewTarget hashing
fixture_shape.head_sha: head commit SHA for stable ReviewTarget hashing
fixture_shape.merge_base_sha: merge-base SHA when diff basis is merge_base

corpus_scenarios.behavior: Fake transport scenario for paginated PR metadata reads without touching live GitHub.

fixture_shape.comments: comments spread across deterministic fake pages
fixture_shape.review_comments: review comments spread across deterministic fake pages
fixture_shape.reviews: reviews spread across deterministic fake pages
fixture_shape.thread_state: resolved/unresolved/unknown thread state spread across fake pages
fixture_shape.labels: labels returned by fake paginated metadata read
fixture_shape.changed_files: changed files returned across fake pages
fixture_shape.patches: patch snippets returned by fake paginated changed-file pages
fixture_shape.base_sha: base commit SHA from fake PR metadata
fixture_shape.head_sha: head commit SHA from fake PR metadata
fixture_shape.merge_base_sha: merge-base SHA from fake compare metadata when relevant
fixture_shape.diff_basis: merge_base or explicit fake transport diff basis

fixtures.behavior: fixture dry run with one postable finding, one local note, trusted and untrusted memory, redaction, and writer-unreachable proof
fixture dry run where a path trigger introduces a specialized_review security reviewer after initial triage
fixture dry run where a diff-pattern trigger introduces logic_review and returns a clarification request with no writer reachability
schema-valid corpus fixture for frontend state-change review shape
schema-valid corpus fixture for security-sensitive review shape
schema-valid corpus fixture for documentation-only risk shape
schema-valid corpus fixture for mixed-surface risk shape
schema-valid corpus fixture for ambiguous logic clarification shape
schema-valid corpus fixture for breaking API review shape
schema-valid corpus fixture for oversized context-budget shape
schema-valid corpus fixture for stale approval target-binding shape
schema-valid corpus fixture for untrusted comment injection memory shape
schema-valid corpus fixture for fake paginated GitHub read shape

reviewer_configs.behavior: fixture reviewer config with initial, specialized path, and logic diff-pattern triggers
